positive: A highly stylized, abstract composition featuring a crescent moon cradling a celestial fox silhouette. The fox should be depicted in a dynamic, flowing pose, surrounded by cosmic nebulae elements and minimalist, delicate floral vines. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric cyan, shimmering gold, and matte black. The style should be a blend of geometric linework, ethereal watercolor washes, and clean, graphic vector art, emphasizing negative space for print readability. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on apparel. Cinematic, volumetric lighting, intricate detail, clean edges, ultra-detailed, art deco influence.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, grainy, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, disfigured, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, realistic photo, low contrast
